'''ât-k-dh''' ('''katakadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anastomise|anastomise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anastomise|anastomise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-k-dh
|-
! Lemma
| katakadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakadh|thitakadh]] || [[word:jitakadh|jitakadh]] || [[word:shitakadh|shitakadh]] || [[word:kitakadh|kitakadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakadh|thuthutakadh]] || [[word:jujutakadh|jujutakadh]] || [[word:shushutakadh|shushutakadh]] || [[word:kukutakadh|kukutakadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutakadh|thutakadh]] || [[word:jutakadh|jutakadh]] || [[word:shutakadh|shutakadh]] || [[word:kutakadh|kutakadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutakadh|thutakadh]] || [[word:jutakadh|jutakadh]] || [[word:shutakadh|shutakadh]] || [[word:kutakadh|kutakadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetakadh|thetakadh]] || [[word:jetakadh|jetakadh]] || [[word:shetakadh|shetakadh]] || [[word:ketakadh|ketakadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotakadh|thothotakadh]] || [[word:jojotakadh|jojotakadh]] || [[word:shoshotakadh|shoshotakadh]] || [[word:kokotakadh|kokotakadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotakadh|thotakadh]] || [[word:jotakadh|jotakadh]] || [[word:shotakadh|shotakadh]] || [[word:kotakadh|kotakadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakadh|thotakadh]] || [[word:jotakadh|jotakadh]] || [[word:shotakadh|shotakadh]] || [[word:kotakadh|kotakadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtakadh|thĂŠtakadh]] || [[word:jĂŠtakadh|jĂŠtakadh]] || [[word:shĂŠtakadh|shĂŠtakadh]] || [[word:kĂŠtakadh|kĂŠtakadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatakadh|thathatakadh]] || [[word:jajatakadh|jajatakadh]] || [[word:shashatakadh|shashatakadh]] || [[word:kakatakadh|kakatakadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakadh|thatakadh]] || [[word:jatakadh|jatakadh]] || [[word:shatakadh|shatakadh]] || [[word:katakadh|katakadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatakadh|thatakadh]] || [[word:jatakadh|jatakadh]] || [[word:shatakadh|shatakadh]] || [[word:katakadh|katakadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatakadh|shatakadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatakadh|goshatakadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatakadh|gokishatakadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatakadhnĂŒ|shatakadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatakadhnknĂŒ|goshatakadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakadhnĂŒ|gokishatakadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatakadhshĂ«|shatakadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkshĂ«|goshatakadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatakadhshĂ«|gokishatakadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakadhro|shatakadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkro|goshatakadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakadhro|gokishatakadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakadhmu|shatakadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkmu|goshatakadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakadhmu|gokishatakadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatakadhsher|shatakadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatakadhnksher|goshatakadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatakadhsher|gokishatakadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatakadhng|shatakadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkng|goshatakadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatakadhng|gokishatakadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatakadhya|shatakadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkya|goshatakadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatakadhya|gokishatakadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatakadhyam|shatakadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkyam|goshatakadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatakadhyam|gokishatakadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakadhnĂŒshĂ«|shatakadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatakadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatakadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakadhnĂŒro|shatakadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakadhnknĂŒro|goshatakadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakadhnĂŒro|gokishatakadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakadhnĂŒmu|shatakadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakadhnknĂŒmu|goshatakadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakadhnĂŒmu|gokishatakadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shatakadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatakadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatakadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakadhshĂ«ro|shatakadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkshĂ«ro|goshatakadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakadhshĂ«ro|gokishatakadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakadhshĂ«mu|shatakadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkshĂ«mu|goshatakadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakadhshĂ«mu|gokishatakadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakadhronĂŒ|shatakadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkronĂŒ|goshatakadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakadhronĂŒ|gokishatakadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakadhroshĂ«|shatakadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkroshĂ«|goshatakadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakadhroshĂ«|gokishatakadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakadhromu|shatakadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkromu|goshatakadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakadhromu|gokishatakadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakadhmunĂŒ|shatakadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkmunĂŒ|goshatakadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakadhmunĂŒ|gokishatakadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakadhmushĂ«|shatakadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkmushĂ«|goshatakadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakadhmushĂ«|gokishatakadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakadhmuro|shatakadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakadhnkmuro|goshatakadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakadhmuro|gokishatakadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
